heading: Rules and regulations when cooperating with military departments
label: 3063 Rules and regulations when cooperating with military departments
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 858 of this titlePub. L. 107–372

children.text: governing the duties to be performed by the Administration in time of war; and
providing for the cooperation of the Administration with the military departments in time of peace in preparation for its duties in time of war.

children.heading: Approval
children.label: b Approval
children.text: Regulations under subsection (a) shall not be effective unless approved by each of those Secretaries.

children.heading: Communications
children.label: c Communications
children.text: Regulations under subsection (a) may provide procedures for making reports and communications between a military department and the Administration.
